title: elaphoglossum grayumii
intro: Elaphoglossum grayumii, also known as the Gray's Elaphoglossum, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum grayumii include its potential to treat various health conditions such as arthritis, fever, and respiratory issues, and may also have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Elaphoglossum grayumii is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal remedies such as tinctures and salves.
